sections.title: Before the completion of Prince Ali Rescue

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you waiting here for?

lines.speaker: Leela
lines.text: That is no concern of yours, adventurer.

sections.title: After the completion of Prince Ali Rescue

lines.speaker: Leela
lines.text: Al Kharid will forever owe you for your help in saving Prince Ali. It's good to know that we have you as a friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's no problem. So how come you're still out here?

lines.speaker: Leela
lines.text: We still don't know why Keli and her bandits took the Prince. I'm hoping I can find out. The place where they imprisoned him seems a good starting point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if you need help, you know where I am. Good luck.
